ops.title: v0.2 API review: seal version.Version; guard Paths.App emptiness
ops.description: Two contract-encoding opportunities from the 2026-07 comment-cleanup audit, both breaking so deferred past v0.1.0: (C2) seal the version.Version interface with an unexported method so Release/Dev stay the only implementations — breaks any external implementer, needs a fleet sweep first; (C3) Paths.App=="" silently roots all state at ~ itself (DBPath/SocketPath/StartLockPath at the home dir, EnsureStateDir mkdirs ~) — a constructor or validation would break fleet struct-literal construction (Paths{App:...}), so it needs a coordinated migration. Related rejected candidates (do NOT revisit): validate()/constructor guards for Spawn/RunConfig/SimpleConfig required func-fields — the nil panic is the styleguide's intended fail-fast; adding guards is defensive coding.

ops.text: Version sealed or a note records why not, after a fleet implementer sweep
Paths.App empty-value footgun closed or explicitly accepted with a note
